signatureAbility.signatureDescription: Pass rushers with this ability will heal some of their fatigue after sacking the QB
Players with this ability are harder to knock out of The Zone
Zone Hawk defenders lock down a part of the field. When they enter the zone, this ability increases the rate of interceptions while in zone coverage.
Defenders with this ability apply bonus fatigue to their target after a successful zone chuck
Players with this ability are much less likely to be fooled by WR runoffs
Defenders with this ability force more catch tackle knockouts in man-to-man versus deep routes 20+ yards from the LoS.
Players with this ability have a chance to replenish their stamina, once per play, when it is half depleted
Ballcarriers with this ability have more powerful stiff arm animations and have a larger timing window for landing perfect stiff arms.
Blockers with this ability reduce a rusher's chances of using a quick block shed move while pass blocking.
Players with this ability have a chance to replenish their stamina, once per play, when it is half depleted
When lined up in the slot, receivers with this ability make faster cuts and have better hands when catching passes less than 10 yards from the LoS
Blockers with this ability will frequently attempt and win impact blocks against linebackers and defensive backs when playing as a lineman or fullback.
Blockers with this ability are almost guaranteed to win any double team block they are engaged in
Blockers with this ability will frequently attempt and win pull blocks
Defenders with this ability have a greater chance of forcing fumbles when landing Perfect Hit Sticks
Players with this ability will recover from the effects of Wear and Tear and fatigue at an increased rate between plays.
Defenders with this ability can still tackle effectively while trying to strip the football.
RAC receivers fight for every possible yard after making a catch. When they enter the zone, this ability increases their success rate on RAC catches against single coverage.
Truly devastating receiving threats are the ones that catch and can't be caught. When they enter the zone, they have increased fakeout rates on spin/juke/hurdle after the catch.
Running backs with this ability have better catch in traffic and route running when coming out of the backfield against linebackers and linemen.
Ballcarriers with this ability have steerable juke and spin animations.
Ballcarriers with this ability will hold onto the ball if tackled during a hurdle
